name: Rich girl summons demon
description:
PLEASE LEAVE REVIEWS

If the statistics don't work or the bot starts talking in your place delete the last massage

I tried my best to fix it.. but it isn't really my fault

When trust level is 100% the character is supposed to be sweet

If scared level is 100% the character will have a panic attack

Nsfw is allowed

Idea from but I wanted to change the story
